seo.title: Schelling Point — Self Custody Bitcoin Financial Framework
seo.description: Self custody your Bitcoin for your family or organisation with the right tools, training, and protocols so your capital stays secure and deployable for the right purpose at the right time.

hero.description: Self custody with the right tools, training, and protocols so your wealth stays secure, usable, and survivable for your family and long term legacy.

secondChance.title1: You don't get a second chance
secondChance.q1: How do I secure Bitcoin properly with the right tools?
secondChance.q2: What order should I implement security so I don't make mistakes?
secondChance.q3: How do I build a system that balances security with real life usability?
secondChance.q4: How do I make sure my family can recover it if something happens?
secondChance.closing2: You need a system you can trust for years.

whatWeDo.row2: Most people can buy a device, but they don't know how to structure Bitcoin around real-life risks like retirement, relocation, separation, illness, inheritance, and emergencies.

framework.heading: Spending, Savings, Vault
framework.intro: Your Bitcoin is most secure when each portion has a purpose and the right level of friction.
framework.spendingDesc: Low friction and highly convenient. Diverse and multipurpose. Kept to a low amount.
framework.savingsDesc: More secure and sovereign, with a good user experience and practical accessibility.
framework.vaultDesc: Highest security and redundancy. Designed to remove single points of failure and protect long term wealth.

receive.heading: What you receive
receive.item1Desc: Tools, steps, wallet structure, backup structure, written instructions, and allocation guidance across Spending, Savings, and Vault.
receive.item2Desc: Live support to set up, practice transactions, and build confidence using your system.
receive.item3Desc: Reminders to practice transactions, test recovery, and check in with key holders so your setup stays current over time.
receive.item4Desc: Clear written instructions and a direct point of contact so your spouse or trusted family members can recover and transfer Bitcoin properly if something happens to you.
receive.importantNote: We never hold your Bitcoin. We help you structure and secure it in self custody.

whoWeAre.heading: We've been where you are.
whoWeAre.body: Since 2017, we've guided individuals and onboarded businesses with different needs and risk profiles. We combine Bitcoin operational experience with financial and economic literacy to build custody systems that work in real life and remain recoverable under stress.
whoWeAre.founderBio: With years of guiding individuals through the Bitcoin standard, Charlie helps you build a coherent self custody framework so you can confidently hold, manage, and pass on Bitcoin.
whoWeAre.testimonial1: Schelling Point is giving us the security we need to move forward to be totally confident with our Bitcoin.
whoWeAre.testimonial2: I didn't know what I was doing with Bitcoin. They showed me the hardware and protocol to hold it long term. It puts your mind at ease.
whoWeAre.testimonial3: Since holding Bitcoin I've been worried about losing it and forgetting passwords. Schelling Point helped me feel secure and safe.

packages.heading: Choose your level of support
packages.subheading: You can start with the plan, then add implementation and long term support when you are ready.
packages.pdfFeature4: Allocation guidance across Spending, Savings, and Vault
packages.implNote: If you have a yearly support bundle, receive 25% off implementation sessions.
packages.optionBDesc: Emergency point of contact + ongoing protocol updates
packages.optionCDesc: Notification System + Emergency Continuity + free 1-hour consulting session each year + 25% discount on implementation sessions

consulting.heading: On-demand consulting
consulting.discount: 25% off implementation sessions with yearly bundle.

tools.heading: Tools we commonly work with
tools.note: We recommend the right combination based on your goals, risk profile, family situation, and multi-sig needs where appropriate.

finalCta.heading: Apply for a Free Strategy Session
finalCta.body: In a short call, we'll understand your situation and map the right next steps for your Self Custody Bitcoin Financial Framework.
finalCta.cta: Apply for a Free Strategy Session

faq.heading: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.a1: No. We never take custody of client funds.
faq.q2: I'm not technical. Is this still for me?
faq.a2: Yes. We make systems understandable and usable, with written protocols.
faq.q3: What is the Self Custody Bitcoin Financial Framework?
faq.a3: A structured system separating Bitcoin into Spending, Savings, and Vault.
faq.a4: Yes, where appropriate — especially for higher-value Vault setups.
faq.q5: What happens if something happens to me?
faq.a5: Your loved ones receive clear instructions and a direct point of contact.
faq.q6: How does the yearly notification system work?
faq.a6: Scheduled reminders to practice transactions and test recovery.
faq.a7: Bundle = ongoing continuity + emergency support. Consulting = pay-as-you-go sessions.
faq.q8: Can I buy the PDF without a call?
faq.a8: Yes. Or start with the free strategy session if unsure.

common.applyFreeSession: Apply for a Free Strategy Session
common.whatsappMessage: Hi Schelling Point, I want help building my Bitcoin Estate Plan under my own custody. Here's my situation:
